findings.description: The Javadoc for `onReceive` states "精査エラーとなった場合は、処理をロールバックしてエラー応答を送信する" — the rollback-on-validation-error behavior is not captured anywhere in the knowledge file. This is decision-necessary for implementors who need to understand the transaction behavior.
findings.source_evidence: Source onReceive Javadoc: 「精査エラーとなった場合は、処理をロールバックしてエラー応答を送信する。」

findings.description: `RM11AC0101Action` — the concrete implementation class name — is absent from the hints of both sections. If a user or agent searches for this class, they will not be directed to this knowledge file.
